preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v Colorado Rapids: Armas eyes back-to-back wins on the road
preReview.description: After getting their first win last weekend, the Colorado Rapids will search for another when they make the trip to San Jose Earthquakes.

QAData.question: Who won between San Jose Earthquakes and Colorado Rapids on Sun, 16 Mar 2025 02:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Colorado Rapids won 2–1 over San Jose Earthquakes on Sun, 16 Mar 2025 02:30:00 GMT.
